TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Corey Benjamin nilacul Corey Benjamin nalecuh i Compton, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corey Benjamin i 1998 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 2 a bulad 24 a demiad, 1978 a mihcaan, Corey Benjamin, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶or…ô b…ônjamin nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ ¶or…ô b…ônjamin nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i ¶ompton, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶or…ô b…ônjamin i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, ¶or…ô b…ônjamin, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Corey Benjamin nilacul Corey Benjamin nalecuh i Compton, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corey Benjamin i 1998 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 2 a bulad 24 a demiad, 1978 a mihcaan, Corey Benjamin, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶or…ô b…ônjamin nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ ¶or…ô b…ônjamin nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i ¶ompton, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶or…ô b…ônjamin i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, ¶or…ô b…ônjamin, miunduaj.
